briefs.title: Development Cost Charge Instalment Elections Before Jan 1, 2026 Grandfathered Under Old Rules
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 248/2025 amends the Development Cost Charge Regulation so that developers who elected instalment payments and paid the first instalment before January 1, 2026 remain governed by the former payment rules, not the new ones.
briefs.action_required: If you paid a DCC first instalment before Jan 1, 2026, confirm your remaining payments follow the former Section 5 rules.

key_dates.label: BC Development Cost Charge new payment rules take effect
